title: leucanthemum minimum var. cuneifolium
intro: Leucanthemum minimum var. cuneifolium, also known as Oxeye Daisy, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, which help to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and infections. Oxeye Daisy has various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Oxeye Daisy include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
